comments.title: Ibitekerezo
comments.noComments: Ba uwa mbere gutanga igitekerezo kuri iyi nkuru.

sidebar.newsletterDescription: Yakira amakuru mashya n'isesengura ryihariye mu ibahasha yawe.
sidebar.advertiseDescription: Gera ku bihumbi by'abasomyi bo mu Rwanda no hanze yayo. Ahantu heza ho kwamamaza umurongo wanyu.

search.title: Ibisubizo by'ubushakashatsi
search.tryAgain: Gerageza amagambo atandukanye cyangwa reba ibicishije mu byiciro.

contactPage.title: Twandikire
contactPage.description: Ufite inkuru, igitekerezo, cyangwa ikibazo? Twishimiye kukumva.
contactPage.storyTipDescription: Ufite amakuru ku nkuru yihutirwa? Itsinda ryacu ry'abanyamakuru rigenzura buri makuru. Amazina yawe azabikwa mu ibanga.
contactPage.advertisingDescription: Urashaka kugera ku basomyi bacu? Twandikire ku byerekeye kwamamaza cyangwa ku byerekeye inkuru zishyurwa.

aboutPage.heroDescription: Menyesha ni urubuga rw'amakuru rwigenga rutanga amakuru y'ukuri kandi adashyigikira uruhande avuye mu Rwanda no ku isi yose.
aboutPage.missionText: Menyesha yashinzwe dufite icyizere kimwe gusa: buri wese akwiye kubona amakuru y'ukuri kandi yanditswe neza. Twiyemeje gutanga inkuru zigisha, zitoza kandi ziha imbaraga abasomyi bacu — dukurikirana ibyabaye mu Rwanda no muri Afurika hamwe n'ibyabaye ku rwego mpuzamahanga bishobora guhindura isi yacu.

independence.title: Ubwigenge mu itangazamakuru
independence.description: Dukomeza kubungabunga ubwigenge bwacu mu itangazamakuru, tutarangwa n'abafite inyungu.

factBased.title: Itangazamakuru rishingiye ku makuru y'ukuri
factBased.description: Buri nkuru igenzurwa neza mbere yo gutangazwa.

perspective.title: Icyerekezo cy'Afurika n'isi
perspective.description: Dutanga amakuru dufite ubumenyi bw'aho hantu mu Rwanda no muri Afurika, mu buryo bw'isi yose.

realTime.title: Amakuru y'ako kanya
realTime.description: Amakuru mashya atangwa mu gihe ibikorwa bibaye.

community.title: Gushyira imbere abaturage
community.description: Dushishikariza ibiganiro bifite ishingiro kandi twubaka umuryango w'abasomyi bashishikaye.

transparency.title: Gukorera ku mugaragaro
transparency.description: Tugaragaza ku mugaragaro inkomoko y'amakuru yacu n'imiyoborere yacu mu itangazamakuru ry'ubunyangamugayo.

aboutPage.contactDescription: Ufite inkuru, gukosora, cyangwa ushaka gufatanya? Twishimiye kukumva.

notFound.title: Urupapuro ntirwabonetse
notFound.description: Urupapuro ushaka ntirubaho cyangwa rwarimutwe ahandi. Gerageza gushakisha icyo ukeneye.

metadata.title: Menyesha - Menya mbere, menya neza
metadata.description: Komeza umenye amakuru mashya, isesengura n'inkuru z'u Rwanda n'isi yose.

footer.description: Gutanga amakuru y'ukuri kandi adashyigikira uruhande n'isesengura ryimbitse ryo mu Rwanda no ku isi yose.

cookies.title: Dukoresha cookies
cookies.description: Dukoresha cookies kugira ngo dusesengure abashyitsi ku rubuga rwacu kandi twongere uburambe bwawe. Ushobora kwemera cyangwa kwanga cookies zitari iz'ibanze.

privacyPage.title: Politiki y'Ibanga
privacyPage.introText: Menyesha ("twe") ikoresha urubuga menyesha.vand.rw. Iyi Politiki y'Ibanga isobanura uburyo dukusanya, dukoresha kandi turinda amakuru yawe igihe usura urubuga rwacu.
privacyPage.collectAnalyticsText: Iyo wemeye cookies, dukoresha Google Analytics kugira ngo dukusanye amakuru y'ikoreshwa atazwi harimo impapuro zasurwe, igihe cyamaze ku mpapuro, ubwoko bw'igikoresho, mushakisha, igihugu, n'aho amakuru aturuka. Aya makuru ntabwo akumenyekanisha ku giti cyawe.
privacyPage.collectLocaleText: Tubika ururimi ukunda (Icyongereza, Igifaransa cyangwa Ikinyarwanda) muri cookie kugira ngo urubuga rugaragare mu rurimi wahisemo.
privacyPage.collectCommentsText: Niba wanditse igitekerezo ku nkuru, dukusanya ibiri mu gitekerezo cyawe kandi tubihuzanya na konti yawe.
privacyPage.cookieAnalytics: Cookies z'isesengura: Google Analytics (_ga, _ga_*) — zishyirwaho gusa nyuma yo kwemera kwawe
privacyPage.cookiesNote: Ushobora kwemera cyangwa kwanga cookies zitari iz'ibanze igihe usura urubuga bwa mbere. Ushobora guhindura ihitamo ryawe igihe icyo ari cyo cyose usiba ububiko bw'aho hantu bwa mushakisha wawe.
privacyPage.sharingText: Ntitugurisha amakuru yawe bwite. Amakuru y'isesengura akorerwa na Google Analytics hakurikijwe politiki y'ibanga ya Google. Ntitusangira amakuru yawe n'undi muntu uwo ari we wese.
privacyPage.contactText: Niba ufite ibibazo kuri iyi Politiki y'Ibanga, twandikire kuri:

termsPage.title: Amategeko n'Amabwiriza
termsPage.introText: Mu gukoresha Menyesha (menyesha.vand.rw), wemera aya Mabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa. Niba utabyemeye, ntukoreshe urubuga rwacu.
termsPage.useText1: Ibikubiyemo byose bishyizwe ahagaragara kuri Menyesha, harimo inkuru, amafoto, n'ibishushanyo, ni iby'Menyesha cyangwa abanditsi bayo kandi birindwa n'amategeko y'uburenganzira bw'umwanditsi.
termsPage.useText2: Ushobora gusangira inkuru zacu kuri rubuga nkoranyambaga cyangwa gushyiraho umuyoboro ujyana kuri zo, ukagaragaza ko zivuye kuri Menyesha. Ntushobora gusubiramo, kongera gutangaza cyangwa gukwirakwiza ibikubiyemo byacu udafite uruhushya rwanditse.
termsPage.conductText: Mu gihe ukoresha urubuga rwacu, harimo igice cy'ibitekerezo, wiyemeza kutazakora ibi bikurikira:
termsPage.conductItem1: Gutangaza ibikubiyemo by'ibinyoma, biyobya cyangwa bisebya
termsPage.conductItem2: Gutoteza, gutera ubwoba cyangwa gukoresha nabi abandi bakoresha
termsPage.conductItem3: Gutangaza spam, kwamamaza cyangwa ibikoresho by'ubucuruzi
termsPage.commentsText: Dufite uburenganzira bwo kugenzura, guhindura cyangwa gukuraho ibitekerezo byica aya mabwiriza. Ibitekerezo bigaragaza ibitekerezo by'abanditsi babyo, ntabwo ari ibya Menyesha.
termsPage.disclaimerText: Menyesha ikora uko ishoboye kugira ngo amakuru yose abe ay'ukuri. Ariko, ntidushobora kwemeza ko amakuru yose auzuye, ay'ukuri cyangwa ari mashya. Amakuru atangwa "uko ari" nta garanti n'imwe.
termsPage.liabilityText: Menyesha ntizaryozwa ibihombo bituruka ku gukoresha cyangwa kutabasha gukoresha uru rubuga cyangwa kwizera ibikubiyemo byose bishyizwe ahagaragara.
termsPage.changesText: Dushobora guhindura aya Mabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa igihe icyo ari cyo cyose. Gukomeza gukoresha urubuga nyuma y'ihinduka bivuze ko wemeye amabwiriza mashya.
termsPage.contactText: Niba ufite ibibazo kuri aya Mabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa, twandikire kuri:
